description: Resume a paused execution (after a model_evaluation step). Call this with the executionId returned in the paused response. Execution continues from the next action until the next model_evaluation or end of plan. Returns either another paused response or final { success, results }.

executionId.description: The executionId from the paused response (returned when execution hit a model_evaluation step).

outputSchema.description: Either a paused response (paused: true, executionId, state, resultsSoFar, nextPossibleSteps) or final result (success, results).
